description_long: This sculpture depicts a male figure in a formal suit, emerging in high relief from a rectangular vertical slab. The man is shown holding a small object in one hand and gesturing with the other, suggesting a moment of action or significance. The facial features and attire are rendered with a moderate level of detail, and the figure's posture is upright and dignified. The slab behind the figure is flat and unadorned except for an inscription beneath the figure, which appears to include a name and dates. The surface of the sculpture has a stone-like, matte gray finish, with some visible texture and weathering. The overall form is robust and solid, indicating it is likely intended for permanent outdoor display.
description: A high-relief sculpture of a man in a suit, emerging from a rectangular slab with an inscription below. The figure is detailed and lifelike, with a textured gray stone finish.
description_view_0: Side view showing the profile of the male figure projecting from the slab, with visible facial features and hand gesture.
description_view_1: Rear view displaying the flat, unadorned back of the rectangular slab, with no visible figure details.
description_view_2: Opposite side profile, mirroring view 0, showing the other side of the figure and the slab's thickness.
description_view_3: Frontal view highlighting the full face, torso, and hands of the male figure, as well as the inscription beneath.
attribute_subject_matter: human figure in formal attire with inscription
attribute_location_context: No clear environmental context is visible; the sculpture appears isolated against a plain background.
